title: [DCME] LRM Medieval RPG Music
description: Custom medieval RPG soundtrack [DCEM] for LRM. Replaces the default music for total in-game immersion.
body:
# [DCME] LRM Medieval RPG Music

Elevate your Minecraft journey with a professional-grade orchestral soundtrack tailored for the LRM experience. This pack does not just swap files—it creates a living, breathing soundscape that reacts to your every move.

## MANDATORY REQUIREMENT

**This resource pack WILL NOT WORK without the following mod:**
**DCME (Dynamic Contextual Music Engine):** [Download on Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/dcme-dynamic-contextual-music-engine)

Thanks to the DCME engine, the medieval themes in [DCME] LRM trigger intelligently based on your actions, current biomes, and the dangers lurking nearby.

---

## Key Features

* **Dynamic Soundscapes:** Music shifts seamlessly when you enter combat, explore a dark dungeon, or rest in a bustling village.
* **True Medieval Immersion:** A curated selection of high-quality tracks featuring lutes, cellos, and war drums for an authentic RPG feel.
* **LRM Optimization:** Perfectly balanced audio levels to ensure you can still hear footsteps, bows, and environmental cues.

## Installation Guide

1. Ensure the **DCME** mod is installed in your mods folder.
2. Download this pack and place the `.zip` file into your `.minecraft/resourcepacks` folder.
3. Activate the pack in your Minecraft **Resource Packs** settings.
4. The DCME engine will automatically handle the integration.

---

> **Note:** If you do not hear any music, double-check that your **Music** volume slider is turned up in the Sound settings and that your DCME mod version matches your game version.
